# chalk_cluster_background_persistence (Resource)

~> **Deprecated** Use `chalk_unmanaged_cluster_background_persistence` instead.

Chalk cluster background persistence resource

**Required permissions:** `team.admin`, `deploy.read`



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `kube_cluster_id` (String) Kubernetes cluster ID
- `namespace` (String) Kubernetes namespace
- `service_account_name` (String) Service account name
- `writers` (Attributes List) Background persistence writers (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--writers))

### Optional

- `api_server_host` (String) API server host
- `bigquery_parquet_upload_subscription_id` (String) BigQuery parquet upload subscription ID
- `bigquery_streaming_write_subscription_id` (String) BigQuery streaming write subscription ID
- `bigquery_streaming_write_topic` (String) BigQuery streaming write topic
- `bq_upload_bucket` (String) BigQuery upload bucket
- `bq_upload_topic` (String) BigQuery upload topic
- `bus_writer_image_bswl` (String) BSWL bus writer image
- `bus_writer_image_go` (String) Go bus writer image
- `bus_writer_image_python` (String) Python bus writer image
- `bus_writer_image_rust` (String) Rust bus writer image
- `google_cloud_project` (String) Google Cloud project
- `kafka_bootstrap_servers` (String) Kafka bootstrap servers
- `kafka_dlq_topic` (String) Kafka DLQ topic
- `kafka_sasl_secret` (String) Kafka SASL secret
- `metrics_bus_subscription_id` (String) Metrics bus subscription ID
- `metrics_bus_topic_id` (String) Metrics bus topic ID
- `operation_subscription_id` (String) Operation subscription ID
- `query_log_result_topic` (String) Query log result topic
- `query_log_subscription_id` (String) Query log subscription ID
- `redis_lightning_supports_has_many` (Boolean) Redis lightning supports has many
- `result_bus_offline_store_subscription_id` (String) Result bus offline store subscription ID
- `result_bus_online_store_subscription_id` (String) Result bus online store subscription ID
- `result_bus_topic_id` (String) Result bus topic ID
- `snowflake_storage_integration_name` (String) Snowflake storage integration name

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Background persistence identifier

- `bus_subscriber_type` (String) Bus subscriber type

- `metadata_sql_ssl_client_key_secret` (String) Metadata SQL SSL client key secret

- `offline_store_inserter_db_type` (String) Offline store inserter DB type
- `query_table_write_drop_ratio` (String) Query table write drop ratio
- `request` (Attributes) Resource requests (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--writers--request))
- `results_writer_skip_producing_feature_metrics` (Boolean) Results writer skip producing feature metrics
- `storage_cache_prefix` (String) Storage cache prefix
- `version` (String) Writer version
